name: extract_review_signals
description: Extract structured product signals from a Spotify user review

sentiment_score.description: Sentiment intensity from -1.0 (very negative) to 1.0 (very positive)

discovery_friction_detected.description: True if the review mentions difficulty discovering new music or repetitive recommendations

discovery_friction_description.description: Direct quote or paraphrase of the discovery friction described, null if none

primary_complaint.description: The main complaint expressed, null if review is positive

primary_praise.description: The main praise expressed, null if review is negative

feature_mentions.description: Specific Spotify features mentioned (e.g., Discover Weekly, Radio, Daily Mix). Only include features explicitly named or clearly referenced in the text.

jtbd_signal.description: What job is the user trying to accomplish? (e.g., 'find new music that matches current mood')

user_intent.description: What the user wants to achieve beyond the immediate complaint

root_cause_signal.description: The underlying cause of the problem described, if inferable

user_segment_signal.description: Inferred user type based on vocabulary and usage patterns

emotion_tags.description: Emotional signals detected in the review

listening_behavior_signal.description: What listening pattern does the user describe or imply?

confidence_score.description: 0.0-1.0 confidence in the accuracy of this extraction. Use lower values when the review is ambiguous or when inferences are uncertain.
